subtitle: Kalinga and the Mauryan Realm, c. 261 BCE

panels.action: Emperor Ashoka stands on a stone terrace overlooking a vast, quiet landscape of Kalinga, his royal Mauryan armor and cloak fluttering in the wind as he presses a hand over his heart, eyes determined yet thoughtful, with distant hills and rivers under a bright sky behind him.

From high above, Emperor Ashoka on horseback looks down at a vast battlefield now fallen silent, scattered broken chariots and abandoned weapons lying across the plain while Kalinga's city walls stand in the distance under a hazy sky.

dialogue.text: Kalinga, after a fierce Mauryan conquest.

dialogue.speaker: emperor_ashoka
dialogue.text: We have won… yet the land feels heavy.

panels.action: Emperor Ashoka dismounts beside a hillside, his shoulders slightly slumped, gazing at groups of weary survivors helping each other walk away from the battlefield, his face troubled as wind tugs at his cloak.

dialogue.text: Ashoka feels the weight of what victory cost.

dialogue.speaker: emperor_ashoka
dialogue.text: So many hearts shaken… for my ambition.

panels.action: A tight close-up on Emperor Ashoka's eyes, a faint reflection of the desolate field visible in them as his brows draw together, tears just beginning to rim his eyes while his jaw firms with new resolve.

dialogue.speaker: emperor_ashoka
dialogue.text: This grief will echo across my realm.

dialogue.speaker: emperor_ashoka
dialogue.text: No more conquest by the sword!

panels.action: Emperor Ashoka stands before a large natural rock, pointing firmly as stone workers and scribes begin to chisel neat lines into its surface, while he dictates with an intense, compassionate gaze toward the horizon.

dialogue.text: Ashoka orders his remorse carved on stone.

dialogue.speaker: emperor_ashoka
dialogue.text: Let all know: I grieve for Kalinga.

panels.action: In a peaceful Kalinga village, Emperor Ashoka stands without weapons among villagers, offering water from a large pot while officials distribute cloth and tend to elders beneath shade trees and newly built shelters.

dialogue.text: In new edicts, he promises care and justice.

dialogue.speaker: emperor_ashoka
dialogue.text: All people are my children. Your welfare is my duty.

panels.action: From behind, Emperor Ashoka stands on a hill beside an inscribed rock, looking out over roads, wells, and groves being built across the landscape, his posture strong and calm as birds wheel in the clear sky.

dialogue.speaker: emperor_ashoka
dialogue.text: My conquest shall be by dhamma—through compassion.
True strength is seeing harm, owning it, and choosing a better path.
